description: Kedarnath floods caused massive destruction due to cloudburst and heavy rainfall.
Chennai floods disrupted urban life due to continuous heavy rainfall.
Flooding impacted Banaskantha region due to heavy rains.
Worst floods in a century affecting all districts of Kerala.
River overflow caused severe flooding in northern Bihar.
Floods affected Belagavi and surrounding regions.
Heavy rainfall caused floods in Mumbai and Kolhapur.
Cyclone Yaas caused flooding in coastal districts.
Heavy rains caused flooding in low-lying areas.
